title: Add event hooks to auth service
description: Add event emission to AuthService for login, logout, and token refresh events. The JWT auth with refresh token rotation is already implemented; this task adds event hooks to allow external systems to subscribe to auth lifecycle events (login, logout, token refresh, token refresh rotation). Should emit events with user context and metadata (IP, user agent, timestamp).
existing_patterns: src/utils/event-emitter.ts - EventEmitter class with on/once/off/emit pattern for subscribing to events
src/utils/event-bus.ts - EventBus class with wildcard support and error handling
src/auth/auth-service.ts - AuthService with login, refresh, verifyAccessToken, logout methods that should emit events
src/auth/auth-service.test.ts - existing test patterns with vi.fn() mocks
